Title: IKEA Recalls MALM and Other Models of Chests and Dressers Due to Serious Tip-Over Hazard Posing Risk of Death to Children
Description: The recalled chests and dressers are unstable if not properly anchored to the wall, posing a serious tip-over and entrapment hazard that can result in death or injuries to children.
ConsumerContact: IKEA toll-free at 866-856-4532 anytime or online at www.ikea-usa.com

Products.Name: MALM 6-Drawer Chest
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 8.2 million (in addition to 6.6 million in Canada)

Injuries.Name: IKEA has received reports of six fatalities and 36 injuries related to tip-over of these chests and dressers.
